description.value:
Trigger You're reduced to 0 Hit Points and are not already wounded.

You avoid death by turning into a spray of red mist. You remain at 1 Hit Point and transform into a vaporous state with the effects of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Vapor Form], except your fly Speed is equal to your land Speed and you can occupy the same space as another creature. Creatures in the same space as you in this form are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Concealed].

You can Dismiss this form, returning to your normal form with 1 Hit Point and becoming @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Wounded]{Wounded 1}. If you don't Dismiss this form within 1 minute, you return to your normal form with 0 Hit Points and become dying 1.
